subcodes.first_line: O thou who art fallen upon the path of God! The ocean of bounty is surging with waves, and the fire of love doth cast forth its sparks. These are the special manifestations [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای افتاده کوی الهی بحر عنایت موج خیز است و نار محبت شررانگیز تجلیات خاصه و
subcodes.subjects: @divine grace, bounty, confirmations; spiritual capacity, @love of God, @love as fire
